items.title: Random POTD Richie Guerin. Iona G was drafted 17th in 54 by NY. Spent 2 yrs w/Marines before coming to NBA in 56. 6x All-Star peaked at 29.5 ppg in 61-62. Retired in 67 (age 34) to coach ATL. Unretired in 69-70 playoffs v LAL in 2d rd & scored 31 pts! Took til 2013 to make HOF.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Random POTD Richie Guerin. Iona G was drafted 17th in 54 by NY. Spent 2 yrs w/Marines before coming to NBA in 56. 6x All-Star peaked at 29.5 ppg in 61-62. Retired in 67 (age 34) to coach ATL. Unretired in 69-70 playoffs v LAL in 2d rd & scored 31 pts! Took til 2013 to make HOF.

items.title: After sifting through some stay-or-go decisions, I'd still be feeling pretty good about the Hawks at No. 23.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
After sifting through some stay-or-go decisions, I'd still be feeling pretty good about the Hawks at No. 23.

Nobody in my (rough) top 23 decided to go back to school in the last few days.

(But a BUNCH of guys in the 25-40 range pulled out of the draft. That range gets hurt.)

items.title: The Knicks finished off the Hawks in Game 6 on April 30th
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks finished off the Hawks in Game 6 on April 30th 

The Knicks will play Game 1 of the NBA Finals on June 3rd.

That means the Knicks will have played 8 games over 35 days. 

They have basically had an All-Star Break's worth of rest between each series.

items.title: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dan Roundfield. Dr Rounds was signed by IND of the ABA in 75. After 3 solid yrs, signed by ATL in 79. Put up 18.5 ppg 11.3 rpg in 6 yrs & made 3 all-star gms. Finished up w/DET & WAS from 84-87. Very good pro. Sadly died in 2012 saving his wife from drowning. RIP.

items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
The Hawks distributed these NBA Jam T-shirts near the end of the season for awards consideration.

Ended up hitting the trifecta.

— MIP for Nickeil Alexander-Walker

— All-NBA for Jalen Johnson

— All-Defense for Dyson Daniels

items.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.

Johnson averaged 22.5 points, 10.3 rebounds (7th in NBA), and 7.9 assists (5th in NBA) per game.

Johnson joins Nikola Jokic as 1 of only 2 players to finish in the top 8 in both rebounds and assists.

items.title: Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks' Dyson Daniels made second team All-Defense. NAW somewhat surprisingly did not get a single vote.

I'm a bit surprised Portland's Toumani Camara didn't get more love, after Blazers made playoffs and he drew an unfathomable number of offensive fouls, but overall a defensible vote.

items.title: Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks guard Dyson Daniels has been named to the All-Defensive second team.

Daniels tied for the league lead in steals per game (2.0) and helped to drive Atlanta to a top-10 overall defense for the first time since the 2016-17 season.
